math_punchlines: your own cells are down bad and you haven't even caught up yet
girl your own body clocked me before you even replied
3 out of 5 of you said yes before you even opened your mouth
your body said yes. i'm just here for the confirmation.
that's a majority. i'm taking that.
60% is a passing grade. you passed.
majority rules and majority likes me. not my fault.
the other 40% just hasn't met me yet
only 40% left. that's basically a formality.
60% locked in. the other 40% is just paperwork.
claiming 60% effective immediately.
this isn't flirting this is literally biology.
don't argue with science. don't argue with me either.
60% of you is already in this and you haven't even agreed yet
do the math. then give me your number.
60% yes is enough to work with fr
we're already halfway there and you haven't even smiled yet
60% water. 60% mine. 0% coincidence.
your body answered before you could. respect.
that's more than half. this is practically official.

list_openers: i need 3 things from u: 1. [innocent] 2. [innocent] 3. ur number
if i could get 3 things: 1) [innocent] 2) [innocent] 3) ur @

pairs.setup: i'm blocking you after tonight
pairs.reframe: for making my standards way too high now

pairs.setup: i just reported your account
pairs.reframe: for stealing my attention every time you post

pairs.setup: lowkey wanna start an argument with you
pairs.reframe: just so we can do that cute makeup stage

pairs.setup: i'm about to ghost you fr
pairs.reframe: by haunting your thoughts every time you go to sleep

pairs.setup: i'm fully stalking you right now
pairs.reframe: for research purposes on how you're that attractive

pairs.setup: i need you to stop posting
pairs.reframe: so i can finally focus on anything but you

pairs.setup: i'm unfollowing you this week
pairs.reframe: for leading the race in my head instead

pairs.setup: i might show up at your house
pairs.reframe: with food, flowers, and that playlist you like

pairs.setup: i'm honestly mad at you
pairs.reframe: for existing in my type so perfectly

pairs.setup: i'm putting you on do not disturb
pairs.reframe: so my heart stops jumping every notification you send

pairs.setup: i'm raising my voice at you

pairs.reframe: so i can memorize it instead of reread it

pairs.setup: i just screenshotted your profile
pairs.reframe: for evidence that angels actually be walking here

pairs.setup: i'm about to start ignoring you
pairs.reframe: so you notice how much you miss my energy

pairs.setup: i'm about to ruin your whole week
pairs.reframe: by making every other conversation feel boring after this one

pairs.setup: i wanna put something inside you

pairs.setup: are your parents divorced?
pairs.reframe: because i can't figure out which one gave you all the looks

pairs.setup: i wanna take you out
pairs.reframe: on a date, what did you think i meant

pairs.setup: i need you on your knees
pairs.reframe: to help me find my contact lens i dropped it

pairs.setup: you're missing something
pairs.reframe: me in your life

pairs.setup: i wanna finish what we started
pairs.reframe: that conversation from your last story

pairs.setup: i think you dropped something
pairs.reframe: your standards when you replied to me

pairs.setup: you need to be locked up fr
pairs.reframe: in my arms where you belong

pairs.setup: i can't stop thinking about last night
pairs.reframe: when i saw your story at 2am and forgot to breathe

pairs.setup: i already told my friends about you
pairs.reframe: that you exist and now they think im lying

pairs.setup: i just know its pinker than that dress
pairs.reframe: the pink dress is beautiful

pairs.setup: do you swallow or spit
pairs.reframe: the gum. what flavor

pairs.setup: i wanna see you on all fours
pairs.reframe: looking for my airpod under the couch

pairs.setup: come eat what my mom made
pairs.reframe: she made me

pairs.setup: i wanna go down on you
pairs.reframe: on the titanic. ill be your iceberg

pairs.setup: i want you to sit on my
pairs.reframe: couch. movie night?

pairs.setup: lets do it tonight
pairs.reframe: the homework. you said you needed help

pairs.setup: i wanna make you scream
pairs.reframe: at the haunted house. theyre open this weekend

pairs.reframe: the new mario kart track. its actually insane

pairs.setup: i want you in my bed
pairs.reframe: room. my cat needs a sitter and shes picky

pairs.setup: can i use your thighs as earmuffs
pairs.reframe: its cold and you look warm

pairs.setup: can you choke me just a little
pairs.reframe: not enough to kill me but enough to humble me

pairs.setup: you know exactly where my face belongs

pairs.setup: Can I also rate the vertical ones?

first_reframes: funny, your paragraph says you care
and yet you still answering me
your curiosity just outed you
wild, you typed all that for ‘no’
if you weren’t into it, you’d ghost
you don’t know me but you’re invested
that ‘idk’ sounded a lot like ‘keep going’
calling it nothing while making it something
you keep saying no, your fingers disagree
interesting way to say ‘try harder’
you’re not interested but still locked in
kinda chatty for someone not curious
lowkey, this is what interest looks like
funny how rejection comes with paragraphs
you don’t know me but you’re here
you say stop, your energy says encore
if you were sure, we’d be done
your ‘whatever’ feels a lot like effort
you’re not feeling it but still replying
that’s crazy, i had you typing though

pairs.assumption: already told my boys about my girlfriend
pairs.followthrough: they expect you at poker night

pairs.assumption: went ahead and saved your contact as “wife”
pairs.followthrough: don’t worry, only my mom saw

pairs.assumption: blocked out our weekly date night already
told my barber i need a ‘taken’ cut
my spotify wrapped thinks we’re dating
pairs.followthrough: made us a shared playlist anyway

pairs.assumption: put our anniversary in my calendar
pairs.followthrough: today. yearly reminder. no backing out

pairs.assumption: told my group chat i’m off the market
pairs.followthrough: they said to bring you sunday brunch

pairs.assumption: gave my uber driver our future house address
already put your name on my hulu profile
pairs.followthrough: password comes with the first kiss

pairs.assumption: told my gym partner i’m busy weekday nights
set your ringtone as my love language
added you to my imaginary wedding seating chart
told siri to remind me to text my girl
already warned my dog about you
told my manager i can’t do late shifts
pairs.followthrough: friday nights are reserved for you

pairs.reframe: annoying as in i’d never get bored of you
npc as in main character in my story
chaotic as in perfectly matching my favorite kind of vibe
red flag as in the color of my next crush
clingy as in exactly how i want you on me
broke as in i’d happily spend on you
confident as in you actually know you’re fine
high maintenance as in worth all the effort fr
delulu as in manifesting me into your life

pairs.roast: you look like you lie a lot
pairs.reframe: lie as in lying on my chest all day
dangerous as in i’d risk it every time
extra as in more than i ever knew i wanted
dramatic as in making my life way more interesting

pairs.roast: you seem like a bad decision
pairs.reframe: bad decision as in the story i’ll tell my kids
intimidating as in so fine i forget how to talk

starters.recovery: well an abandoned treasure is still treasure

starters.awkward: i just got out of therapy
starters.recovery: she said face my fears and here i am
but i can make reservations like nobody’s business
because you were in my head rent free
she knew i was saving the good lines for someone better
my boss said i was too distracted and showed him your story
and yet here you are still reading
but rich in audacity and that’s what matters

starters.awkward: i cried at a movie last night
starters.recovery: the part where they got together reminded me i havent shot my shot yet

starters.awkward: im the least athletic person you know
starters.recovery: but i run through your mind daily so that counts

starters.awkward: i still sleep with a stuffed animal
starters.recovery: but i could upgrade if you want the position

starters.awkward: i talk to myself in the mirror
starters.recovery: practicing what to say when i finally meet someone like you

starters.awkward: my mom still packs my lunch
starters.recovery: she said the girl im about to text deserves a man whos fed

starters.awkward: i got rejected 3 times this week
starters.recovery: so statistically you should say yes to balance the universe
but i will drown in your dms till you rescue me

starters.awkward: id bark but my dignity hanging by a thread
starters.recovery: good thing you look worth losing it for

starters.awkward: ive never begged for anything with this much pride
starters.recovery: first time for everything and you look like a good first

escalations: you look like a whole meal
and i’m not running from it
youre the main ingredient i was missing
dinner friday is the taste test
you just gave me heart failure
you pulled me in from across the room
rehab starts when you text back
you just pulled a disappearing act on my standards
now my type is just you
the trick is giving me your number
